description.value:
Your clan has dedicated itself to galactic exploration aboard a dwarven generation ship like the Star Citadel Ironstar as part of the New Quest for Sky. Decades in space have left you more familiar with navigating stars than tunnels.

You become trained in Piloting. If you would automatically become trained in Piloting (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. If you succeed at a Piloting check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Navigate] or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Plot Course], you get a critical success instead. You also gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Piloting checks made to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Recall Knowledge] about starships.
